summary: Applied two surgical continuity edits: one at entry to carry forward Chapter 4's missed-call pressure, and one at exit to bridge into Chapter 6's house/suspension setup. No style-bible example_lines were present to replace.
edits: Added opening callback to command/mother missed-call carryover so Chapter 5 starts on the same pressure line established at Chapter 4's close.
Added a late-scene swamp-cooler rag detail to align Chapter 5's final night texture with Chapter 6's opening sensory context.
Verified style_bible.json contains no example_lines entries requiring verbatim replacement.
